contract_meta.rationale: Evidence in src/repair/buildRepairPrompt.ts:1 shows generic guidance only; no adaptation by FailureCategory beyond listing failures. src/repair/analyzeFailure.ts:62-90 classifies failures into 'syntax'|'timeout'|'assertion'|'exception'|'multiple' but this signal is unused to tailor prompts. src/repair/multiTurnRepair.ts:240-266 builds messages without strategy branching; attempts can repeat ineffective patterns. .automation/evaluation_results.json indicates mixed repair outcomes across runs. This contract introduces a strategy selector mapping failure categories and attempt number to targeted instructions (e.g., syntax → focus on parser error line; timeout → performance/async fixes; assertion → align behavior with tests; exception → add guards). It integrates selected strategy into prompts and (optionally) records it per attempt. Expected impact: fewer wasted attempts, higher pass rate by attempt ≤3, improved clarity in repair history.

project.name: executor-mvp
project.goal: Select and apply adaptive repair strategies based on failure analysis and attempt number to increase successful repairs and reduce attempts.
project.scope: Strategy selector, prompt integration, optional history annotation, unit/integration tests

execution_model.description: Verify 4B baseline exists, add adaptive strategy with full tests, validate outcomes.

verify_commands.on_fail: HALT - Use Node 20.x for contract execution

observability.description: Trace strategy selection for each repair attempt

tasks.title: Verify Phase 4B baseline present
tasks.description: Ensure planning/repair artifacts exist before adding adaptive strategy

tasks.title: Win #41: Add repair strategy selector
tasks.description: Create strategySelector.ts that maps FailureCategory + attemptNumber to strategy enum and returns targeted guidance text.

exports: export function selectStrategy(category: FailureCategory, attempt: 1|2|3|4): RepairStrategy
content_spec.logic: Map category + attempt to strategy. For attempt>=3 add conservative guidance.

success_criteria: Selector returns expected strategy per category/attempt

tasks.title: Win #42: Integrate strategy into repair prompts
tasks.description: Modify buildRepairPrompt to include strategy-guided instructions; update multiTurnRepair to pass FailureCategory and attempt number.

actions.content_spec: Import strategySelector, append strategyGuidance() to instruction section based on category and attempt.
Pass attemptNumber and currentFailureAnalysis.category to buildRepairPrompt or selector as needed.
Asserts prompts contain strategy-specific guidance for each category.

tasks.title: Win #43: Optional strategy annotation in history
tasks.description: Optionally record selected strategy per attempt in RepairHistory with non-breaking schema update and tests.

actions.content_spec: Add optional attempt.strategy: string enum of strategies
Expand TS types to include strategy? field; ajv compile remains strict.
Validator accepts history with/without strategy; multiTurnRepair populates field

tasks.title: Phase 4B1 validation gate
tasks.description: Ensure lint/typecheck/tests green and key artifacts present

release_actions.cmd: git commit -m "feat(4B1): adaptive repair strategy and prompt integration"

ai_executor_guidelines.observability_first: Trace selected strategy per attempt in logs
ai_executor_guidelines.win_isolation: Implement and test selector before integration
ai_executor_guidelines.phase_specific_guidance: Prefer minimal, targeted diffs informed by category
ai_executor_guidelines.fail_fast: Do not proceed on failing tests
